evidence.text: Title: Blameless post-mortems: what I owe to John Allspaw and the Etsy engineering team URL Source: https://sylvain.artois.io/tech/blameless-postmortem-en Published Time: 2026-04-02T00:00:00.000Z Markdown Content: Wednesday, April 1st 2026, 8:35 AM, Meaux train station. I had scheduled a LinkedIn post at 8:30. I need to paste a link in the comments. I look for the URL on my tech blog. Unreachable. ## The incident 8:37 AM. The connection is unreliable at the station, so I do what everyone does: I type “test” into DuckDuckGo. Results show up. The internet works. My site does not. 8:38 AM. I check my other services.
